_description: v7.3.5 Ratchet — Floor values that must not be crossed. Raise by editing after a successful release; never lower. check-ratchet.js enforces these in CI.

testCount.note: v7.3.4 shipped with 4703, v7.3.5 adds ~85 new tests across step-types, slash-audit, injection-gate, htn-step-validation, daemon-goal-review, intent-overmatch-final, and tool-call-verification. Floor 4700 leaves small margin for minor test consolidations but catches any accidental deletion.

fitnessScore.note: File-size WARNs on CommandHandlers.js (847), SelfModificationPipeline.js (705), PromptBuilderSections.js (734) account for the missing 3 points. Those are intentional and scheduled for a domain-split refactoring release.

schemaMismatches.note: scan-schemas.js must always report 0. Runtime event payloads must match declared schemas.

schemaMissing.note: audit-schemas.js missing check — catalog entries without schema registrations must be 0.

schemaOrphan.note: audit-schemas.js orphan check — schemas without catalog entries must be 0.

brokenLinks.note: docs/ internal links must all resolve. Prevents accidental rename-without-update.
